```{r biomarker-cards, results='asis'}
# Helper: create a biomarker card as raw HTML
biomarker_card <- function(title, score, classification, interpretation, icon) {
  # Determine badge color
  badge_class <- if (tolower(classification) %in% c("high", "positive", "unstable", "msi-h")) {
    "badge-high"
  } else if (tolower(classification) %in% c("low", "negative", "stable", "mss")) {
    "badge-low"
  } else {
    "badge-intermediate"
  }

  glue('
<div class="biomarker-card">
  <div class="biomarker-icon">{icon}</div>
  <h4 class="biomarker-title">{title}</h4>
  <div class="biomarker-score">{score}</div>
  <div class="biomarker-badge {badge_class}">{classification}</div>
  <p class="biomarker-interp">{interpretation}</p>
</div>
')
}

# ── TMB ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tmb_score <- if (!is.null(tmb)) {
  round(tmb$score %||% tmb$tmb_score %||% 0, 1)
} else { NA }

tmb_class <- if (!is.null(tmb)) {
  tmb$classification %||% tmb$status %||%
    if (!is.na(tmb_score) && tmb_score >= 10) "High" else "Low"
} else { "N/A" }

tmb_interp <- if (!is.null(tmb)) {
  if (tmb_class %in% c("High", "TMB-High")) {
    "TMB-High (\u226510 mut/Mb) — may benefit from immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy (pembrolizumab)."
  } else {
    "TMB-Low (<10 mut/Mb) — below threshold for TMB-directed immunotherapy."
  }
} else { "TMB data not available." }

# ── MSI ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
msi_score <- if (!is.null(msi)) {
  round(msi$score %||% msi$msi_score %||% msi$percent_unstable %||% 0, 2)
} else { NA }

msi_class <- if (!is.null(msi)) {
  msi$status %||% msi$classification %||%
    if (!is.na(msi_score) && msi_score >= 20) "MSI-H" else "MSS"
} else { "N/A" }

msi_interp <- if (!is.null(msi)) {
  if (msi_class %in% c("MSI-H", "High", "Unstable")) {
    "Microsatellite Instability-High — indicates deficient mismatch repair (dMMR). Eligible for pembrolizumab (tumor-agnostic)."
  } else {
    "Microsatellite Stable — no evidence of mismatch repair deficiency."
  }
} else { "MSI data not available." }

# ── HRD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
hrd_score <- if (!is.null(hrd)) {
  round(hrd$score %||% hrd$hrd_score %||% 0, 1)
} else { NA }

hrd_class <- if (!is.null(hrd)) {
  hrd$status %||% hrd$classification %||%
    if (!is.na(hrd_score) && hrd_score >= 42) "Positive" else "Negative"
} else { "N/A" }

hrd_interp <- if (!is.null(hrd)) {
  if (hrd_class %in% c("Positive", "High", "HRD-Positive")) {
    "Homologous Recombination Deficiency detected — may benefit from PARP inhibitor therapy (olaparib, niraparib)."
  } else {
    "No evidence of homologous recombination deficiency."
  }
} else { "HRD data not available." }

# ── Render cards ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat('<div class="biomarker-grid">\n')

cat(as.character(biomarker_card(
  title          = "Tumor Mutational Burden",
  score          = if (!is.na(tmb_score)) paste0(tmb_score, " mut/Mb") else "N/A",
  classification = tmb_class,
  interpretation = tmb_interp,
  icon           = "TMB"
)))

cat(as.character(biomarker_card(
  title          = "Microsatellite Instability",
  score          = if (!is.na(msi_score)) paste0(msi_score, "%") else "N/A",
  classification = msi_class,
  interpretation = msi_interp,
  icon           = "MSI"
)))

cat(as.character(biomarker_card(
  title          = "Homologous Recombination Deficiency",
  score          = if (!is.na(hrd_score)) as.character(hrd_score) else "N/A",
  classification = hrd_class,
  interpretation = hrd_interp,
  icon           = "HRD"
)))

cat('</div>\n')
```
